title: OrganizationMember
description: OrganizationMember schema from Censys Platform API

created_at.description: The date and time the user was created.

first_login_time.description: The date and time the user first logged in.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

latest_login_time.description: The date and time the user last logged in.

roles.description: The roles this member has in the organization.

uid.description: The ID of a Censys user.
